item.title: My first comic
item.description: Today I have been doing something I had been waiting to do for a long time: a comic using AI.

item.title: Recommended books
item.description: 50 recommended books, in no particular order Economics in One Lesson The Mystery of Capital Imagined communities 1491 The Case Against Education The Dawn of Everything Fossil Future Galileo’s Middle Finger The Dictator’s Handbook How Religion Evolved The Identity Trap Ideas: A History of Thought and...

item.title: Things I want to read
item.description: A collection of books and articles that I would like to read at some point Papers Real Patterns by Daniel C.

item.title: Things I want to watch
item.description: Documentaries Turning point: The bomb and the cold war Brian Wilson: Long Promised Road The monk and the gun Movies The dangerous liaisons La nuit de Varennes YouTube Moai building By Stefan Milo Fall of Civilizations All the episodes .

item.title: Simulating an Alien Fauna
item.description: For the past few days, I have been simulating a population of “aliens” to create original teaching materials for an upcoming phylogenetics workshop.

item.title: Risks of Cultural Abundance
item.description: We live in a time with endless opportunities to consume all sorts of cultural products.

item.title: Are species natural kinds?
item.description: I have always considered that species are natural kinds and organisms merely instances of a general class.

item.title: index
item.description: Welcome to Weak Priors This is a place to share some thoughts.
